gemini_setup: 1. Get an API key from https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
4. Set gemini_model to the desired model (see below)
gemini_models: gemini-2.0-flash - Fast, cost-efficient, excellent for agentic tasks
gemini-2.5-flash-preview - Preview of next-gen flash model
gemini-3-flash-preview - Preview of latest Gemini 3 flash model
ollama_models: qwen2.5-coder:32b - Best for coding and technical tasks
azure_setup: 1. Get your resource endpoint and API key from the Azure Portal
3. Set azure_endpoint to your resource URL (e.g. https://my-resource.openai.azure.com)
5. Set azure_model to your deployment name (e.g. gpt-4o)
fireworks_setup: 1. Get an API key from https://fireworks.ai/account/api-keys
4. Set fireworks_model to the desired model (see below)
notes.target_base_url: Base URL of target application (e.g., https://api.example.com)
notes.max_iterations: Maximum number of autonomous testing iterations (1-100)
